question_text: Name two different types of non-contact forces.
correct_answer: Gravitational force and magnetic force (or gravitational and electrostatic, or magnetic and electrostatic)
explanation: Non-contact forces are forces that act without objects needing to touch. The three main non-contact forces are gravitational force (pull of gravity), magnetic force (attraction/repulsion between magnets), and electrostatic force (attraction/repulsion between charged objects).
